message:
feat(abi): add 33 Tier 8 symbols (stdio extras, wide I/O, stdlib temps)

New symbols: setlinebuf, flockfile/ftrylockfile/funlockfile,
getc_unlocked/putc_unlocked/fgetc_unlocked/fputc_unlocked,
fmemopen, open_memstream, fopencookie (stdio);
fgetwc/fputwc/ungetwc/fgetws/fputws/getwchar/putwchar,
fwprintf/wprintf/swprintf/vfwprintf/vwprintf/vswprintf,
fwscanf/wscanf/swscanf/vfwscanf/vwscanf/vswscanf (wchar I/O);
mkstemps, mkostemps, clearenv (stdlib). Total symbols: 854.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
